rulings.Case Title: MARILYN S. REDDEN VS. DANCEGROUND KERIAC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 4, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT SCOTT WELLS, LINDSAY GAUTHIER, ANDRE WILLIAMS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain. See Tanforan v. Tanforan (1916) 173 Cal.270 and Steiner v. Rowley (1950) 35 Cal.2d 713. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BONNIE CHAN VS. TRUNG KIEN THAI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 4, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT TRUNG THAI MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. The Court notes that the opposition was filed late in violation of the Court's order. Even if the Court considers Plaintiff's late-filed opposition, Plaintiff fails to present competent evidence to create a triable issue of fact regarding creation of a new tenancy after expiration of the operative notice by accepting rent. = (501/REQ)
